shipping.summary: Our styles are available online and in-stores.READ MOREDesigned for the real lives of womenAbout UsOur StoryStoresPromotionsLBCommunityAs Seen OnOur CareersBusiness OpportunitiesExclusive DealsTop ProductsTopsDressesPantsShorts & SkortsJumpsuitsSkirtsTop CollectionsSignaturesBestsellersWorkParty & OccasionsNeed Help?My AccountFAQSize GuideMaterial CareOrder & DeliveryReturnsPayment ModesContact UsWe AcceptI am shipping toAbout UsTop ProductsTop CollectionsNeed Help?I am shipping to © 2010-2026.

tax.summary: We perfect our seam lines on custom-made mannequins that reflect Asian women’s sizes and body types.

fee.summary: How Love, Bonito uses your personal informationWe may use and disclose your Personal Data for the following purposes:To provide our servicesTo establish and maintain your user account and/or loyalty program on our sites, including tracking your orders, purchase history, and shipments and sending you reminders of items left in your shopping cart and/or providing you with product notifications;To improve our services and business, including in response to trends, patterns, feedback, and sentiments expressed on social media or directly to us;To process your order for our products or services, process or collect your payment for the order;To process your returns or refunds in accordance with our Terms and Conditions;To understand your needs and interests, and personalise your experience with the Service and our communications such as by using your location information to determine your language preferences or display accurate date and time information; andTo provide support for the Service, respond to your requests, questions and feedback, evaluate your satisfaction with the Service and to otherwise administer our relationship with you.To provide you with supporting services and functions related to your user account;To monitor and enforce compliance with our Terms and Conditions, including dispute resolution; andTo comply with (i) internal risk controls, (ii) the terms of our access to payment processing, financial or banking services such as credit card disputes, fraud, billing errors, or (iii) any applicable lawMarketing and AdvertisingTo send you marketing communications and ads in relation to our sales, products, services and promotions, including promotional mail together with your order;To deliver advertisements which are related to our products and services which may be of interest to you on our websites and/or social media platforms;To invite you to our Love, Bonito events;To process your participation in our promotions, lucky draws, initiatives or any request for additional Personal Data such as customer surveys;To process your participation in our loyalty programs;To promote our products and services on our websites; To improve your customer experience across all touchpoints and training our customer experience team, such as by recording and monitoring phone calls; andFor any specific purpose in relation to a particular product or service, which we may separately notify you on the product or service pageResearch and DevelopmentWe may use your Personal Data for research and development purposes, including to analyse and improve the Service and our business.

result.overall_note: Local rule-based extraction from official policy pages.
